mission.title: atlantis: Feature Request: Halt execution on pre-workflow hook failure
mission.description: Feature Request: Halt execution on pre-workflow hook failure. Requested by 20+ users.

steps.title: Check current atlantis deployment
steps.description:
Verify your atlantis version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n atlantis -l app.kubernetes.io/name=atlantis
helm list -n atlantis 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working atlantis installation.

steps.title: Review atlantis configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant atlantis configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n atlantis -l app.kubernetes.io/name=atlantis
kubectl get configmap -n atlantis -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=atlantis
```
Currently the execution of plan continues even if there is a failure in pre-workflow hook, this is potentially dangerous.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Feature Request: Halt execution on pre-workflow hook failure
steps.description:
## What

- Add a `fail-on-pre-workflow-hook-error` flag to the Atlantis server configuration.
- update the `RunAutoplanCommand` and `RunCommentCommand` functions to check the `fail-on-pre-workflow-hook-error` flag when pre workflow hooks fail, and if it is set, then do not run the requested
```yaml
repos:
- id: /.*/
  pre_workflow_hooks:
    - description: Hook1
      run: |
        exit 1
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n atlantis -l app.kubernetes.io/name=atlantis
kubectl get events -n atlantis --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Feature Request: Halt execution on pre-workflow hook failure" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
## What

- Add a `fail-on-pre-workflow-hook-error` flag to the Atlantis server configuration.
- update the `RunAutoplanCommand` and `RunCommentCommand` functions to check the `fail-on-pre-workflow-hook-error` flag when pre workflow hooks fail, and if it is set, then do not run the requested Atlantis command.

- id: /.*/
  pre_workflow_hooks:
    - description: Hook1
      run: |
        exit 1

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with atlantis installed or the issue environment reproducible.
